name: Inventory Snapshot (Example)
sql: select entity, count_value from (select 'publishers' as entity, toFloat64(count(*)) as count_value from raw.publishers union all select 'campaigns' as entity, toFloat64(count(*)) as count_value from raw.campaigns union all select 'ad_units' as entity, toFloat64(count(*)) as count_value from raw.ad_units) t
